CVE-2019-13952.title: The set_ipv6() function in zscan_rfc1035.rl in gdnsd before 2.4.3 ...
CVE-2019-13952.description: The set_ipv6() function in zscan_rfc1035.rl in gdnsd before 2.4.3 and 3.x before 3.2.1 has a stack-based buffer overflow via a long and malformed IPv6 address in zone data.
